title: phaseolus vulgaris var. xanthozebra
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. xanthozebra, also known as yellow kidney bean, is a variant of the common bean plant (Phaseolus vulgaris) that is characterized by its yellow or cream-colored seed coat. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. xanthozebra include its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
